notes: generateQuiz is the public wrapper the app calls (via src/lib/sidecar/quiz-dispatch.ts); it fans out THREE parallel quizGeneratorFlow runs (easy/medium/hard) and returns QuizVariantsOutput — 3x AI spend per case, prod p50 ~30s, budget 60s+. Each variant (easy/medium/hard) is nullable on partial failure: skip script checks on null variants but require at least one non-null variant for the case to pass. userId is required by the schema; cases use '' which short-circuits profile fetch and library persistence. options[]/correctAnswer are excluded from script checks (often numeric or single letters).
